utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Hey everybody , Rachel was so good today . She did not gossip at all .

emotion_cause.span: 1_Rachel was so good today . She did not gossip at all .
3_I found something out something about someone

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Even when I found out ... umm , all right , well let just say I found something out something about someone and let just say she is gonna keep it .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Hey , Pheebs ! Check ... check this out .

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Ooh , you nailed the Old Lady !

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Yeah listen so , I thought I was getting better , so on my way home today I stopped by this guitar store and

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Did you , did you touch any of the guitars while you were there ?

emotion_cause.span: 7_did you touch any of the guitars while you were there ?

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Give me your hands . Strings . Gimme it ! Pick . Do you want to learn to play guitar ?
